body.title: Palace: C-system-availability root constraint node + schema
body.result: palace.constraints schema + 4 nodes seeded (system-availability root + no-cc-spawn + burn-rate-gate); design doc D-constraints-first-class-2026-05-31.md committed
body.description:
Add constraint as a first-class palace node type. Seed C-system-availability as the root: 'CC must remain accessible to Akien — blackout = all work stops.' Typed subtypes: budget, behavioral, resource, temporal, quality. Each constraint links to what it gates (decision types, ticket tags, dispatch paths).

**Affected files:** lab/design_docs/decisions/ (constraint schema doc), palace seed script or psql insert
**Design rules:** palace-first; no SQLite; constraint nodes follow same shape as goal/decision nodes
**Scope boundary:** in: schema definition, C-system-availability seed node, derived constraints (no-CC-spawn, burn-rate-gate). out: enforcement wiring into audit-design (separate ticket)
**Completion criteria:** (1) constraint node schema documented; (2) C-system-availability node exists in palace with typed children; (3) queryable via memory_get(path='palace.constraints.system-availability')
